title: senna cornigera
intro: Senna cornigera, also known as the "thread-bearing senna", is a shrub-like plant in the legume family that is native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly as a laxative, due to its high concentration of anthraquinone glycosides. The health benefits of senna cornigera include its ability to relieve constipation and promote bowel movements, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce inflammation. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or dried leaf infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
